2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

568 CMLT - Comparative Literature

CLFS609 Special Topics (1-3 Credits)

Individual instruction course. Contact Program Director or instructor before registering.

Prerequisite: Two years of teaching experience; and CLFS510. Restriction: Must be in Master of Chemical & Life Sciences (Master's) program; and permission of CMNS-Chemical & Life Sciences department. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
